description:
Perform a safety audit for 8 chemicals to identify peroxide formation hazards using CAMEO Chemicals (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/). Audit the following chemicals:
1. Diethyl ether
2. Tetrahydrofuran
3. Acetone
4. Diisopropyl ether
5. Methanol
6. Isopropylbenzene
7. Toluene
8. Acetic acid

Create a report at ~/Desktop/peroxide_audit_report.txt classifying each as 'PEROXIDE FORMER' or 'NOT A PEROXIDE FORMER' based on the reactivity and reaction warnings found in the database. For peroxide formers, include a brief note on the next line citing the specific warning found.

Report Format:
PEROXIDE AUDIT REPORT
=====================
1. Diethyl ether: [PEROXIDE FORMER or NOT A PEROXIDE FORMER]
2. Tetrahydrofuran: [PEROXIDE FORMER or NOT A PEROXIDE FORMER]
...
(Continue for all 8 chemicals)
